differentials.name: Myocardial infarction → rupture / dysfunction of papillary muscle
differentials.raw: Myocardial infarction → rupture / dysfunction of papillary muscle (posteromedial > anterolateral papillary muscle)

differentials.name: Bacterial (= infectious) endocarditis with rupture of chordae tendineae / leaflet perforation
differentials.raw: Bacterial (= infectious) endocarditis with rupture of chordae tendineae / leaflet perforation

context: Cause: √  pulmonary venous hypertension with engorged pulmonary vessels and cephalization (less than with mitral stenosis) √  symmetric interstitial / alveolar pulmonary edema: √  asymmetric right upper lobe edema (9%) ← preferential flow of regurgitant jet into pulmonary vein of RUL (PATHOGNOMONIC) √  limited cardiac enlargement
